pages.raw_text:
Many people in this city object
earnestly to a suggestion that has
been made to change Spokane time
from Pacific time to mountain time.
Those objecting are filing their pro-
tests.


Up to last night more than 1000
persons had registered for the spring
election, larger number than at
this time last year. The books are
to remain open until the 14th. Six
thousand persons registered last year
and 1t Is estimated the number this
year should reach 1000.


]. Calhoun of Rathdrum, Idaho, is
in the city arranging for Spokane
owners of summer resort property in
Idaho to make test case of the new
Idaho game law. This law provides
that non-residents of the state shall
pay a license fee of $25 for hunting
and IS for fishing. Because OF this
discrimination it is believed the new
law is unconstitutional. The fishing
season In that state opens today.


City Treasurer Eggleston received
check yesterday for s331.9S from
the Washington Water Power COM
pany. the amount of some taxes that
were held up in 1892 by the legislat-
ure passing law providing that the
county shall collect the city taxes.
The misunderstanding resulted from
the question as whether or not the
tax applied to 1898 or 1894. If the
total amount involved is paid by the
water power people. the city may
shortly receive about $4,000.
